keyFindings.description: PR has merge conflicts with main (CONFLICTING). Implementer must rebase before merge.
taskDepths and rootDescendantCounts maps never pruned — consistent with existing tasks map behavior but worth noting for long-running processes.
No rehydration test for spawn limits — implementation logic is sound but test coverage gap for post-rehydration limit enforcement.
Stale implement handoff records wrong filesChanged (from different issue). Not a code defect.
